## Problem

What problem does this solve? How does it relate to the project's target users (people with motor or cognitive difficulties and their caregivers)?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or improvement you'd like.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Use cases, mockups, or references to similar features elsewhere.
